turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 90-18 Gilmer versus Interstate Johnson Lane Corporation will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the clerk, the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit is affirmed. Justice Stevens has filed a dissenting opinion in which Justice Marshall joined.
